package.name: ads_simulation
package.description: SUMO-based simulation bridge for the Autonomous Driving Stack. Runs SUMO headless on the Tempe road network, resolves click-to-drive lat/lon goals to SUMO edges, spawns and drives the ego vehicle, spawns background traffic on the route's reverse-direction edges, and publishes lane and nearby-building geometry. Also provides the Pygame OpenStreetMap viewer for click-to-drive pin placement, and a WebSocket bridge (car3d_bridge) for a browser-based Three.js 3D viewer of the same route.
